title: Wrack EV3 Health
description: EV3 robot health dashboard (PEN-231). v1: battery percentage only, sourced from the device_status heartbeat payload PEN-234 pushes through the unified ingress health leg. NOTE: the panel's PromQL query is the placeholder __CONFIRM_METRIC_NAME__, not a live value -- provision-dashboard.sh's --metric-name substitutes the real, confirmed name at provisioning time so an unverified guess can never be shipped as the active query. docs/monitoring/ev3-health-dashboard.md derives wrack_device_status_percentage as the expected value from otlp-mapper.js's naming plus Grafana's published OTLP-to-Prometheus translation rules, and explains what's still worth confirming in Metrics Explorer before trusting it blindly.

panels.title: EV3 Battery %
panels.description: Estimated remaining battery charge, from the device_status heartbeat's percentage field (PEN-234). Query is a placeholder substituted at provisioning time -- see dashboard description.
